summary: Upgrade governance regression coverage to execute real learning-gate and deployment-state behaviors instead of relying on fabricated output fixtures.
root_cause: Governance tests validated mock outputs and static structures, which could miss real script drift and misleading pass conditions.
fix_approach: Replaced simulated checks with executions of the real scripts under controlled conditions and updated integrity-guard coverage to satisfy environment prerequisites explicitly.

validation.notes: Real script execution is now covered for the main governance failure and recovery paths.
